seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and ensuring clarity.
new_constraint: Write the email in a humorous and witty tone.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and ensuring clarity. Write the email in a humorous and witty tone.
response:
Subject: The plot twist you didn't see coming (my resignation)

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well, and preferably not staring at a spreadsheet that just doesn't add up.

I'm writing to let you know that I've officially decided it's time to leave the building—officially as of [Last Working Day Date].

While my time here has been an absolute education in corporate survival tactics, I've realized that my heart isn't set on spending another day analyzing why our coffee machine is judging me more harshly than most people judge their exes. Instead, I feel ready to venture out into the unknown to find a role where the only thing I have to debug is my own life story.

This decision wasn't made lightly; after all, I've already learned that "quick fixes" rarely stick when it comes to my enthusiasm for late-night meetings. But sometimes, one needs to change channels entirely to avoid getting burned by too much static.

Please consider me my own boss from now on. My focus will be on becoming the person who finally remembers to water their plants and sets alarms for things other than deadlines.

Thank you for your leadership, patience, and for tolerating my occasional quirks while they lasted. I'll make sure everything is handed over neatly so you can start filling that spot with someone who won't make you question if the company logo is actually a tiny face grimacing in pain.

I hope we can stay in touch. If you ever need someone to vent about office politics without fear of retribution (or awkward silence), I'll be around!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]<|im_end|>
